response.justification: Nearly two decades of hands-on fullstack experience with a strong TypeScript/Node.js/React core, current AI-agent and MCP tooling work that matches the role's unusual AI agent development requirement, plus demonstrated testing rigor (TDD, test-framework authorship) and cloud/container experience. The main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin exposure and no stated Vitest/Playwright use, but the breadth and depth suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React product experience at multiple companies
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, built test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: Kotlin absent from skills (Java present but dated)
Testing stack listed doesn't explicitly include Vitest or Playwright
